title: Flowfile YAML Schema
description: Schema for Flowfile data flow definition files (.yaml, .yml)

MinimalFieldInfo.description: Represents the most basic information about a data field (column).
MinimalFieldInfo.title: MinimalFieldInfo

RawData.description: Represents data in a raw, columnar format for manual input.
RawData.title: RawData

BasicFilter.description:
Defines a simple, single-condition filter (e.g., 'column' 'equals' 'value').

Attributes:
    field: The column name to filter on.
    operator: The comparison operator (FilterOperator enum value or symbol).
    value: The value to compare against.
    value2: Second value for BETWEEN operator (optional).
BasicFilter.title: BasicFilter

FilterInput.description:
Defines the settings for a filter operation, supporting basic or advanced (expression-based) modes.

Attributes:
    mode: The filter mode - "basic" or "advanced".
    basic_filter: The basic filter configuration (used when mode="basic").
    advanced_filter: The advanced filter expression string (used when mode="advanced").
FilterInput.title: FilterInput

DataType.description: Specific data types for fine-grained control.
DataType.title: DataType

FieldInput.description: Represents a single field with its name and data type, typically for defining an output column.
FieldInput.title: FieldInput

FunctionInput.description: Defines a formula to be applied, including the output field information.
FunctionInput.title: FunctionInput

SelectInput.description:
Defines how a single column should be selected, renamed, or type-cast.

This is a core building block for any operation that involves column manipulation.
It holds all the configuration for a single field in a selection operation.
SelectInput.title: SelectInput

SortByInput.description: Defines a single sort condition on a column, including the direction.
SortByInput.title: SortByInput

RecordIdInput.description: Defines settings for adding a record ID (row number) column to the data.
RecordIdInput.title: RecordIdInput

UniqueInput.description: Defines settings for a uniqueness operation, specifying columns and which row to keep.
UniqueInput.title: UniqueInput

AggColl.description:
A data class that represents a single aggregation operation for a group by operation.

Attributes
----------
old_name : str
    The name of the column in the original DataFrame to be aggregated.

agg : str
    The aggregation function to use. This can be a string representing a built-in function or a custom function.

new_name : Optional[str]
    The name of the resulting aggregated column in the output DataFrame. If not provided, it will default to the
    old_name appended with the aggregation function.

output_type : Optional[str]
    The type of the output values of the aggregation. If not provided, it is inferred from the aggregation function
    using the `get_func_type_mapping` function.

Example
--------
agg_col = AggColl(
    old_name='col1',
    agg='sum',
    new_name='sum_col1',
    output_type='float'
)
AggColl.title: AggColl

GroupByInput.description:
A data class that represents the input for a group by operation.

Attributes
----------
agg_cols : List[AggColl]
    A list of `AggColl` objects that specify the aggregation operations to perform on the DataFrame columns
    after grouping. Each `AggColl` object should specify the column to be aggregated and the aggregation
    function to use.

Example
--------
group_by_input = GroupByInput(
    agg_cols=[AggColl(old_name='ix', agg='groupby'), AggColl(old_name='groups', agg='groupby'),
              AggColl(old_name='col1', agg='sum'), AggColl(old_name='col2', agg='mean')]
)
GroupByInput.title: GroupByInput

PivotInput.description: Defines the settings for a pivot (long-to-wide) operation.
PivotInput.title: PivotInput

UnpivotInput.description: Defines settings for an unpivot (wide-to-long) operation.
UnpivotInput.title: UnpivotInput

TextToRowsInput.description: Defines settings for splitting a text column into multiple rows based on a delimiter.
TextToRowsInput.title: TextToRowsInput

GraphSolverInput.description: Defines settings for a graph-solving operation (e.g., finding connected components).
GraphSolverInput.title: GraphSolverInput

PolarsCodeInput.description: A simple container for a string of user-provided Polars code to be executed.
PolarsCodeInput.title: PolarsCodeInput

JoinInput.description: Data model for standard SQL-style join operations.
JoinInput.title: JoinInput

JoinInputs.description: Data model for join-specific select inputs (extends SelectInputs).
JoinInputs.title: JoinInputs

JoinMap.description: Defines a single mapping between a left and right column for a join key.
JoinMap.title: JoinMap

CrossJoinInput.description: Data model for cross join operations.
CrossJoinInput.title: CrossJoinInput

FuzzyMatchInput.description: Data model for fuzzy matching join operations.
FuzzyMatchInput.title: FuzzyMatchInput

UnionInput.description: Defines settings for a union (concatenation) operation.
UnionInput.title: UnionInput

OutputCsvTable.description: Defines settings for writing a CSV file.
OutputCsvTable.title: OutputCsvTable

OutputExcelTable.description: Defines settings for writing an Excel file.
OutputExcelTable.title: OutputExcelTable

OutputParquetTable.description: Defines settings for writing a Parquet file.
OutputParquetTable.title: OutputParquetTable

OutputSettings.description: Defines the complete settings for an output node.
OutputSettings.title: OutputSettings

InputCsvTable.description: Defines settings for reading a CSV file.
InputCsvTable.title: InputCsvTable

InputExcelTable.description: Defines settings for reading an Excel file.
InputExcelTable.title: InputExcelTable

InputJsonTable.description: Defines settings for reading a JSON file.
InputJsonTable.title: InputJsonTable

InputParquetTable.description: Defines settings for reading a Parquet file.
InputParquetTable.title: InputParquetTable

ReceivedTable.description: Model for defining a table received from an external source.
ReceivedTable.title: ReceivedTable

DatabaseConnection.description: Defines the connection parameters for a database.

anyOf.description: An ID referencing an encrypted secret.

DatabaseConnection.title: DatabaseConnection

DatabaseSettings.description: Defines settings for reading from a database, either via table or query.
DatabaseSettings.title: DatabaseSettings

DatabaseWriteSettings.description: Defines settings for writing data to a database table.
DatabaseWriteSettings.title: DatabaseWriteSettings

CloudStorageReadSettings.description: Settings for reading from cloud storage
CloudStorageReadSettings.title: CloudStorageReadSettings

CloudStorageWriteSettings.description: Settings for writing to cloud storage
CloudStorageWriteSettings.title: CloudStorageWriteSettings

SampleUsers.description: Settings for generating a sample dataset of users.
SampleUsers.title: SampleUsers

NodeSettings_manual_input.description: Settings for a node that allows direct data entry in the UI.
NodeSettings_manual_input.title: NodeManualInput

NodeSettings_filter.description: Settings for a node that filters rows based on a condition.
NodeSettings_filter.title: NodeFilter

NodeSettings_formula.description: Settings for a node that applies a formula to create/modify a column.
NodeSettings_formula.title: NodeFormula

NodeSettings_select.description: Settings for a node that selects, renames, and reorders columns.
NodeSettings_select.title: NodeSelect

NodeSettings_sort.description: Settings for a node that sorts the data by one or more columns.
NodeSettings_sort.title: NodeSort

NodeSettings_record_id.description: Settings for a node that adds a unique record ID column.
NodeSettings_record_id.title: NodeRecordId

NodeSettings_sample.description: Settings for a node that samples a subset of the data.
NodeSettings_sample.title: NodeSample

NodeSettings_unique.description: Settings for a node that returns the unique rows from the data.
NodeSettings_unique.title: NodeUnique

NodeSettings_group_by.description: Settings for a node that performs a group-by and aggregation operation.
NodeSettings_group_by.title: NodeGroupBy

NodeSettings_pivot.description: Settings for a node that pivots data from a long to a wide format.
NodeSettings_pivot.title: NodePivot

NodeSettings_unpivot.description: Settings for a node that unpivots data from a wide to a long format.
NodeSettings_unpivot.title: NodeUnpivot

NodeSettings_text_to_rows.description: Settings for a node that splits a text column into multiple rows.
NodeSettings_text_to_rows.title: NodeTextToRows

NodeSettings_graph_solver.description: Settings for a node that solves graph-based problems (e.g., connected components).
NodeSettings_graph_solver.title: NodeGraphSolver

NodeSettings_polars_code.description: Settings for a node that executes arbitrary user-provided Polars code.
NodeSettings_polars_code.title: NodePolarsCode

NodeSettings_join.description: Settings for a node that performs a standard SQL-style join.
NodeSettings_join.title: NodeJoin

NodeSettings_cross_join.description: Settings for a node that performs a cross join.
NodeSettings_cross_join.title: NodeCrossJoin

NodeSettings_fuzzy_match.description: Settings for a node that performs a fuzzy join based on string similarity.
NodeSettings_fuzzy_match.title: NodeFuzzyMatch

NodeSettings_record_count.description: Settings for a node that counts the number of records.
NodeSettings_record_count.title: NodeRecordCount

NodeSettings_explore_data.description: Settings for a node that provides an interactive data exploration interface.
NodeSettings_explore_data.title: NodeExploreData

NodeSettings_union.description: Settings for a node that concatenates multiple data inputs.
NodeSettings_union.title: NodeUnion

NodeSettings_output.description: Settings for a node that writes its input to a file.
NodeSettings_output.title: NodeOutput

NodeSettings_read.description: Settings for a node that reads data from a file.
NodeSettings_read.title: NodeRead

NodeSettings_database_reader.description: Settings for a node that reads from a database.
NodeSettings_database_reader.title: NodeDatabaseReader

NodeSettings_database_writer.description: Settings for a node that writes data to a database.
NodeSettings_database_writer.title: NodeDatabaseWriter

NodeSettings_cloud_storage_reader.description: Settings for a node that reads from a cloud storage service (S3, GCS, etc.).
NodeSettings_cloud_storage_reader.title: NodeCloudStorageReader

NodeSettings_cloud_storage_writer.description: Settings for a node that writes to a cloud storage service.
NodeSettings_cloud_storage_writer.title: NodeCloudStorageWriter

NodeSettings_external_source.description: Settings for a node that connects to a registered external data source.
NodeSettings_external_source.title: NodeExternalSource

NodeSettings_promise.description: A placeholder node for an operation that has not yet been configured.
NodeSettings_promise.title: NodePromise

NodeSettings_user_defined.description: Settings for a node that contains the user defined node information
NodeSettings_user_defined.title: UserDefinedNode

id.description: Unique identifier for this node within the flow

type.description: The type of node (determines what settings are available)

is_start_node.description: Whether this node is a starting point for the flow (no inputs)

description.description: Optional description of what this node does

left_input_id.description: Node ID for left input (used by join nodes)

right_input_id.description: Node ID for right input (used by join nodes)

input_ids.description: List of node IDs that provide input to this node

outputs.description: List of node IDs that this node outputs to

setting_input.description: Node-specific settings (structure depends on node type)

execution_mode.description: Execution mode - Development for debugging, Performance for production

execution_location.description: Where to execute the flow - locally or on a remote worker

show_detailed_progress.description: Whether to show detailed progress during execution

nodes.description: List of nodes in the flow
